title: Power rating and energy yield of hybrid CPV/ flat-plate PV modules
author: Martínez, Juan F.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Article describes the IEC compliant power rating procedure applied to a hybrid CPV/PV module.
